revision_note: OPTION-B CONCISE re-authoring of all 108 definitions at natural dictionary length, under the maintainer ruling of 2026-07-11 (maintainer decision issue 6, kernel-of-truth repo): the v2 store (poc/knull/inputs-v2/plain-authored.json, v2.0.2) met the defect-class half of the ratified quality gate (both judge families: zero anaphoric-renaming / staged-observer / exemplification findings) but missed the blind-naturalness floor, and both judges traced the residual unnaturalness to the L-3/L-4 structural footprint - the +/-25 percent word band against the NSM gloss (~2x natural entry length) and the mandatory second claim segment. The maintainer resolved the ASM-0706 escalation by choosing Option B: author at natural concise length and deliberately RELAX L-3 (word band: dropped for this store) and L-4 (two-segment minimum: relaxed to >=1 admissible claim segment, the floor the claim-item contract actually needs), while keeping every other clause of the frozen G-1 matching contract unchanged (LC1 own-label incl. headword, pairwise + vs-canonical uniqueness, no-verbatim-NSM-line both directions, register ratio >= 0.25 with per-segment non-NSM content, own-gloss Jaccard < 0.5, ASCII, no double quotes, disclosure). The FLOP-parity guarantee that L-3/L-4 carried moves out of the store and into the design: a deterministic length-matched plain-padded secondary arm plus a descriptive token-count sensitivity read, specified in docs/next/design/knull-optionb-analysis.md (PROPOSED-ASM-1080..ASM-1088). Style: the 18 maintainer-reviewed Option-B samples, tightened further per the maintainer's concision note (e.g. music drops 'the sounds so made'); genus + differentiae in the fewest words that define; the most apt word in each slot; a second sense division only where genuinely definitional; no padding toward any length target; no exemplification-by-listing, no consequence narration, no staged observers, no anaphoric renaming. The blind two-family quality gate (ASM-0703) is to be RE-RUN on this store before freeze.

authoring_disclosure.fork: F-KN-A option (ii) full re-authoring, Option-B concise revision under the maintainer ruling of 2026-07-11 (issue 6): natural-length lexicographic English; G-1 contract enforced MINUS L-3 (word band, dropped) and L-4 (segments, relaxed to >=1 admissible) via poc/knull/lint_plain_store_v3.py; blind two-family quality gate (ASM-0703) to be re-run on this store before freeze
authoring_disclosure.drafting_model_family: Claude family (Fable) - a different vendor and model family from the SmolLM2 host models
authoring_disclosure.register: concise general-dictionary English at natural entry length - genus + differentiae, the most apt word, parenthetical subject restrictions only where load-bearing, sense divisions only where genuinely definitional; every clause definitional; no padding toward any length target
authoring_disclosure.constraints_inherited_from_build: own-label LC1 (full label AND headword), >=1 admissible claim segment (>=15 chars, no double quotes; L-4 RELAXED from >=2 by the Option-B ruling), pairwise + vs-canonical uniqueness, no-verbatim-NSM-line, register ratio >= 0.25, own-gloss Jaccard < 0.5, ASCII only; the +/-25 percent word band (L-3) is DROPPED for this store by the same ruling

definitions.alive: living rather than dead; still performing the vital functions
definitions.angry: feeling or showing strong displeasure at a wrong or provocation
definitions.archived (bookmark boolean property): (of a bookmark) moved from the active list into storage; retrievable but not deleted
definitions.begin (happening X begins at time T): to start; to come into being or operation
definitions.believe (X believes Y): to accept as true, especially without proof
definitions.birth (the event): the emergence of young from the mother's body; the beginning of a separate existence
definitions.bookmark: a stored record of a web page's address, kept for ready return
definitions.break (X breaks Y): to cause to separate into pieces by a blow or strain; to put out of working order
definitions.broken: in pieces; fractured; (of a device) out of working order
definitions.cause (happening X causes happening Y): to bring about; to produce as an effect
definitions.celebration: the marking of a happy occasion with festivity and rejoicing
definitions.change (the event): the process of becoming different; a passing from one state to another
definitions.condolence (the words): an expression of sympathy offered to a person in mourning or misfortune
definitions.conversation: an informal exchange of speech between two or more people
definitions.dead: no longer alive; having ceased the functions of life
definitions.death (the event): the end of life; the permanent cessation of the vital functions
definitions.end (happening X ends at time T): to come or bring to a close; to cease
definitions.event: an occurrence, especially a notable one
definitions.find (X finds Y): to discover, whether by search or by chance
definitions.forget (X forgets Y): to lose remembrance of; to fail to recall
definitions.friend (X is a friend of Y): a person bound to another by mutual affection, apart from family or romance
definitions.gift: something given willingly and without payment; a present
definitions.give (X gives Y to someone): to hand over to another as their own, freely and without payment
definitions.grieving: mourning a loss, especially a death
definitions.happy: feeling or showing pleasure or contentment
definitions.has part (X has part Y): to contain or include as a constituent
definitions.help (X helps Y): to aid or assist; to further another's efforts
definitions.inside (X is inside Y): situated within; contained by the bounds of a thing
definitions.kind (gufo:Kind, sortal type): the class to which a thing necessarily and permanently belongs, fixing how it is counted and reidentified
definitions.learn (X learns Y): to gain knowledge or skill by study, instruction, or practice
definitions.lie (the words): a false statement made with intent to deceive
definitions.lose (X loses Y): to be deprived of; to mislay
definitions.lost: mislaid; no longer to be found
definitions.make (X makes Y): to form from parts or materials; to bring into existence
definitions.maker of (X is the maker of Y): the person whose work has brought a thing into being
definitions.memory (a stored something): the faculty by which the mind retains past experience; an impression so retained
definitions.near (X is near Y): a short distance away; close at hand
definitions.part of (X is part of Y): one of the portions into which a whole may be divided
definitions.promise (the words): a binding assurance that one will do, or refrain from doing, a stated thing
definitions.remember (X remembers Y): to retain in the mind; to recall what was known before
definitions.reminder (the made something): a note or token that serves to bring a matter back to mind
definitions.repair (X repairs Y): to restore to good condition after damage or wear; to mend
definitions.right (of a doable something): morally good, just, or proper; such as ought to be done
definitions.take (X takes Y): to lay hold of and carry off; to get possession of
definitions.teacher: a person whose occupation is giving instruction, especially in a school
definitions.thief: a person who steals another's property secretly and without right
definitions.trustworthy: worthy of confidence; reliable and honest
definitions.useful (of a something): serving a practical purpose; of value in getting something done
definitions.visible: capable of being seen; perceptible by the eye, directly or through an instrument
definitions.wrong (of a doable something): contrary to morality; deserving of blame
definitions.animal: a living organism that feeds on organic matter and can move of its own accord
definitions.ball: a rounded object struck, kicked, or thrown in games and sports
definitions.bear: a large heavy mammal with thick shaggy fur, walking on the soles of its feet
definitions.bird: a warm-blooded egg-laying animal with feathers, wings, and a beak
definitions.blue: of the color of a cloudless daytime sky or of deep clear water
definitions.book: a written or printed work made of leaves fastened together within covers
definitions.box: a container with a flat base and upright sides, typically with a lid
definitions.car: a wheeled motor vehicle for a driver and a few passengers
definitions.cat: a small domesticated carnivorous mammal with soft fur, retractile claws, and whiskers
definitions.child: a young human being below the age of puberty; also, a son or daughter
definitions.close: to shut; to block an opening with a door, lid, or cover
definitions.clothes: articles worn to cover the body; garments collectively
definitions.cold: at a low temperature; chilly; the opposite of hot
definitions.color: the quality by which a thing appears red, blue, or of some other hue, apart from its shape or size
definitions.cry: to shed tears from grief, pain, or other strong feeling; to weep
definitions.day: the period of light between sunrise and sunset; also, a period of twenty-four hours
definitions.dog: a domesticated carnivorous mammal of the wolf family, kept as a companion or worker
definitions.eat: to take food into the mouth, chew, and swallow it; to consume a meal
definitions.eye: the globular organ of sight, set in the front of the head
definitions.father: a male parent; a man in relation to his child
definitions.fire: the state of burning, giving out heat and light with flame
definitions.fish: a cold-blooded water animal that breathes by gills and swims with fins
definitions.flower: the blossom of a plant, containing its organs of reproduction
definitions.food: any substance eaten or drunk to maintain life and growth; nourishment
definitions.grass: a green plant with jointed stems and narrow leaves, forming the low herbage of fields
definitions.ground: the solid surface of the earth; the soil underfoot
definitions.hand: the end of the arm beyond the wrist, by which things are grasped
definitions.head: the uppermost part of the body, containing the brain, mouth, and chief organs of sense
definitions.house: a building for human habitation, especially the dwelling of a family
definitions.hug: an embrace in which the arms are clasped around another person
definitions.jump: to spring clear of the ground by a thrust of the legs
definitions.laugh: to utter the short broken sounds that express mirth or amusement
definitions.light: the radiant energy that acts on the eye to render things visible
definitions.money: a medium of exchange in coins and banknotes; currency
definitions.mother: a female parent; a woman in relation to her child
definitions.mouth: the facial opening through which food is taken in and speech uttered
definitions.music: the art of combining vocal or instrumental sounds in melody, harmony, and rhythm
definitions.night: the dark part of the daily cycle, from sunset to sunrise
definitions.open: to unfasten a door, lid, or cover so as to give entry or view
definitions.picture: a representation of a person, scene, or object on a flat surface
definitions.rabbit: a small burrowing mammal with long ears, soft fur, and a short tail
definitions.red: of the color of blood or of a ripe cherry
definitions.rock: a large mass of stone; the hard mineral matter of the earth
definitions.run: to go on foot at a pace faster than a walk
definitions.sit: to rest the body on the buttocks with the trunk upright
definitions.sky: the expanse of air and space above the earth, where the sun, moon, and stars appear
definitions.sleep: the natural state of rest in which the eyes close and consciousness is suspended
definitions.smile: an upward turning of the corners of the mouth, expressing pleasure or friendliness
definitions.sun: the star around which the earth revolves and from which it receives light and heat
definitions.tree: a tall woody plant having a single main trunk from which branches grow
definitions.walk: to travel on foot at an ordinary pace, one foot always on the ground
definitions.water: the colorless, tasteless liquid that falls as rain and fills rivers and seas
